calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Doucette.
Petitioner: Milvia Escobar, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Leonidas Wilson.
The Minor: Leonidas Wilson, also served as a Spanish Interpreter for his mother/Petitioner.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Eduardo Garcia.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Reset To Apr-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Petitioner: Milvia Escobar, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Leonidas Eduardo Wilson.
Leonidas Wilson is also served as an Spanish Interpreter for his Mother/Petitioner.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Lacks the Proof of Publication, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to April 24, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.

Application In Support Of Order Dispensing With Notice To Minor'S Parent
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Text Ruling
